betterquesting:10.desc:8:
While containment chances are small and can only be filled/emptied from bottom they have other important properties. If two are placed near each other the fluids inside can have interactions. Below is a list of a few notable ones

Water + lava = obsidian, cobblestone, and stone (who'da thunk)
Starlight + water = ice
Starlight + lava = sand and aquamarine
